changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Seed lightweight records management model and rm:record aspect
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO content_model_definitions ( id, namespace_uri, prefix, name, description, author, status, version_label, created_by ) SELECT ${uuid_function}, 'https://athena.ecm/model/rm/1.0', 'rm', 'recordsManagement', 'Seeded Records Management model', 'system', 'ACTIVE', '1.0', 'system' WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM content_model_definitions WHERE prefix = 'rm' );

INSERT INTO aspect_definitions ( id, name, title, description, parent_name, model_id, created_by ) SELECT ${uuid_function}, 'record', 'Record', 'Marks a live document as a declared record', NULL, cmd.id, 'system' FROM content_model_definitions cmd WHERE cmd.prefix = 'rm' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM aspect_definitions ad WHERE ad.model_id = cmd.id AND ad.name = 'record' );

INSERT INTO property_definitions ( id, name, title, description, data_type, mandatory, multi_valued, default_value, indexed, protected_field, encrypted, aspect_definition_id, created_by ) SELECT ${uuid_function}, 'declaredAt', 'Declared At', 'Record declaration timestamp', 'DATETIME', false, false, NULL, false, true, false, ad.id, 'system' FROM aspect_definitions ad JOIN content_model_definitions cmd ON cmd.id = ad.model_id WHERE cmd.prefix = 'rm' AND ad.name = 'record' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM property_definitions pd WHERE pd.aspect_definition_id = ad.id AND pd.name = 'declaredAt' );

INSERT INTO property_definitions ( id, name, title, description, data_type, mandatory, multi_valued, default_value, indexed, protected_field, encrypted, aspect_definition_id, created_by ) SELECT ${uuid_function}, 'declaredBy', 'Declared By', 'Username that declared the record', 'TEXT', false, false, NULL, false, true, false, ad.id, 'system' FROM aspect_definitions ad JOIN content_model_definitions cmd ON cmd.id = ad.model_id WHERE cmd.prefix = 'rm' AND ad.name = 'record' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM property_definitions pd WHERE pd.aspect_definition_id = ad.id AND pd.name = 'declaredBy' );

INSERT INTO property_definitions ( id, name, title, description, data_type, mandatory, multi_valued, default_value, indexed, protected_field, encrypted, aspect_definition_id, created_by ) SELECT ${uuid_function}, 'declarationComment', 'Declaration Comment', 'Optional comment captured at declaration time', 'TEXT', false, false, NULL, false, true, false, ad.id, 'system' FROM aspect_definitions ad JOIN content_model_definitions cmd ON cmd.id = ad.model_id WHERE cmd.prefix = 'rm' AND ad.name = 'record' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM property_definitions pd WHERE pd.aspect_definition_id = ad.id AND pd.name = 'declarationComment' );

INSERT INTO property_definitions ( id, name, title, description, data_type, mandatory, multi_valued, default_value, indexed, protected_field, encrypted, aspect_definition_id, created_by ) SELECT ${uuid_function}, 'declaredVersionLabel', 'Declared Version Label', 'Document version label at declaration time', 'TEXT', false, false, NULL, false, true, false, ad.id, 'system' FROM aspect_definitions ad JOIN content_model_definitions cmd ON cmd.id = ad.model_id WHERE cmd.prefix = 'rm' AND ad.name = 'record' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM property_definitions pd WHERE pd.aspect_definition_id = ad.id AND pd.name = 'declaredVersionLabel' );

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM property_definitions WHERE aspect_definition_id IN ( SELECT ad.id FROM aspect_definitions ad JOIN content_model_definitions cmd ON cmd.id = ad.model_id WHERE cmd.prefix = 'rm' AND ad.name = 'record' );
